title: satureja tragoriganum
intro: Satureja tragoriganum, also known as the Moroccan savory, is a perennial plant native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Satureja tragoriganum include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce pain and inflammation. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
